name: Interpret
short_description: This game is a light and fun casual game where players use the AD keys to control a trophy moving left and right at the bottom of the screen.
detailed_description: This game is a light and fun casual game where players use the AD keys to control a trophy moving left and right at the bottom of the screen. The objective is to catch as many gold coins as possible falling from the top of the screen while skillfully avoiding randomly appearing bombs. Each successful catch of a coin is accompanied by a crisp and pleasant sound, adding a lot of enjoyment to the game. The game features a clean and cheerful interface with a light and pleasant background melody, making it perfect for unwinding during leisure time. As the game progresses, the speed at which coins and bombs fall will increase, testing the player's reaction time and hand-eye coordination. By continuously challenging yourself, you can try to beat your highest score.
